title: Canvas login fails after password reset
description: I reset my school password this morning and Canvas still says my login is invalid even though I can sign into some other services.

title: Cannot connect to campus Wi-Fi in lecture hall
description: My laptop sees the campus wireless network but authentication keeps failing in the engineering lecture hall.

title: Printer setup package missing on library kiosk
description: The library kiosk cannot find the print client anymore and users cannot send jobs to the shared printer.

title: MFA enrollment keeps looping
description: The student portal sends me back to the MFA setup screen every time I try to enroll my authenticator app.

title: Zoom audio devices not detected in classroom lab
description: Zoom cannot find a microphone or speakers on the classroom lab machine, and restarting the app did not help.

title: Antivirus warning after installing research tool
description: After installing a research application, Windows Security flagged the app and I am not sure whether it is safe to continue.

title: Billing portal still shows tuition payment sync as pending
description: The billing portal still shows tuition payment sync as unpaid even though the transaction already cleared. I was trying to complete the payment from my Windows 11 laptop while in the engineering building, and the account page never refreshed after switching from Chrome to Edge. The deadline tied to this task is in two days, so I need it fixed before the workflow closes.

title: Financial dashboard is missing my updated tuition payment sync
description: The finance section in the billing portal never updates the tuition payment sync status after a successful payment session. I confirmed the receipt, then tried the same account from a second browser and the same stale balance remained. The deadline is in two days, and at least one other user in my group saw the same behavior on the same system.

title: Campus card app will not load my student ID pickup pass
description: The campus card app opens, but the QR pass for my student ID pickup pass never loads on my MacBook Air. I signed out, signed back in, and the screen stays blank instead of showing the pickup code. I can work around it for the moment, but I need the correct setup before next week.

title: Badge kiosk cannot print my student ID pickup receipt
description: The self-service badge kiosk in the north residence hall accepts my lookup, but it never prints the confirmation slip tied to my student ID pickup pass. A vendor-side restart did not clear the queue, and students are stuck at the final print step. This is not urgent, but I would like the system corrected before the next routine use.

title: Sports sign-up page will not open in the campus portal
description: When I open the sports sign-up page area from the student life portal, the page either spins forever or returns me to the home screen. I tried from a iPhone in the north residence hall, and the same broken page loaded after trying the same step from an incognito window. I can work around it for the moment, but I need the correct setup before next week.

title: Registration email never arrived for sports sign-up
description: I completed the sports sign-up page flow in the student life portal, but no confirmation email or follow-up link ever arrived in my school inbox. I checked spam, retried the form once, and still do not have the message that should confirm the registration. This is not urgent, but I would like the system corrected before the next routine use.

title: Cannot join campus Wi-Fi from my classroom device
description: My lab workstation sees the campus network in the student union, but the campus Wi-Fi login step fails every time I try to authenticate. I retried after clearing the browser cache, and the device still drops back to the sign-in prompt. I can work around it for the moment, but I need the correct setup before next week.

title: Wireless onboarding portal keeps rejecting campus Wi-Fi login
description: The wireless onboarding portal loads, but after I enter my school credentials it loops back to the start instead of completing the campus Wi-Fi login. Another user in the same area saw the same login loop on a second device. This is not urgent, but I would like the system corrected before the next routine use.

title: Student portal blocks the elective change for semester 3 workflow
description: The student portal opens the elective change for semester 3 page, but it errors out before I can submit the form. I tried from a classroom podium PC in the science annex, and the same page broke again after signing out and back in. This is blocking normal work for one user today, but it does not look like a campus-wide outage.

title: Elective change for semester 3 page times out before submission
description: I can reach the elective change for semester 3 section in the student portal, but the final submit action hangs until the browser times out. I repeated the workflow from two browsers and the timeout happens at the same step. I can continue once this path works again, but right now the system is stopping normal work.

title: Canvas is missing Data Structures materials
description: The Canvas course shell opens, but the Data Structures materials section is empty even though my classmates can see it. I re-synced the course list after switching from Chrome to Edge, and the materials still do not appear. This is blocking normal work for one user today, but it does not look like a campus-wide outage.

title: Chromebook cannot open Data Structures materials in Canvas
description: My Windows 11 laptop signs into Canvas, but every link for Data Structures materials fails to load and sends me back to the assignment list. I restarted the browser and tried a second network without changing the result. I can continue once this path works again, but right now the system is stopping normal work.
